security.message: Appel systeme direct ({function}) : verifier l'origine des arguments
security.excerpt: $pdo->exec("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS `{$dbName}` CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci");
